modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks Spanish as their first language.
You should write the description in bullet points and use a formal and professional tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be poor spelling and grammar and some repeated wording or phrases.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Email folder missing from Outlook 2016 selection list.

full_description_text:
- El usuario estaba utilizando Outlook 2016 para acceder a su correo electrónico.  
- De repente, un folder que normalmente estaba en la lista de selección desapareció.  
- Esto ha causado confusión y dificultad para encontrar correos importantes.  
- El usuario necesita ayuda para recuperar el folder que falta en su lista.
